pi_items.source: Task description matches metadata claim, consistent with Drupal Commerce payment gateway naming conventions
Drupal Commerce official documentation confirms 'manual' is a valid payment gateway plugin type for handling manual payments like bank transfers
Task description matches metadata claim, display_label is a standard configuration field for Drupal Commerce manual payment gateways per official documentation
Drupal Commerce payment gateway documentation confirms 'live' and 'test' are the default mode options; both are valid
Web search for routing number 021000021 shows this number is registered to JPMorgan Chase Bank in Tampa, FL, not First National Bank. See JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA routing number documentation.
Web search found Urban Electronics, Inc. (not LLC) as a game studio in Detroit, MI, focused on AR/Blockchain. No verifiable bank account information exists for 'Urban Electronics LLC'.

US bank account number format validation shows account numbers must be 4-17 characters for ACH payments. This 10-digit number falls within the valid range. Format is valid even though the specific account does not exist.

Routing number validation confirms 021000021 is a valid US routing number format (9 digits). However, this number is registered to JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NA in Tampa, FL (10430 Highland Manor Drive), not to any 'First National Bank'.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic/test data for a Drupal Commerce payment gateway configuration training environment. The manual payment gateway plugin type is verified as valid. The mode 'live' is a standard Drupal Commerce mode option. However, the routing number 021000021 is associated with JPMorgan Chase Bank in Tampa, FL, not with any First National Bank, creating an inconsistency in the bank account information provided. The company 'Urban Electronics LLC' has no verifiable public records. The account number format (7890123456) is valid for US banks.
